name: Zenduty
description: Zenduty — Incident management and on-call alerting platform integrating with monitoring tools for escalation, runbooks, and postmortems.

seo.title: Zenduty — Crash Reporting
seo.meta_description: Zenduty: Zenduty — Incident management and on-call alerting platform integrating with monitoring tools for escalation, runbooks, and postmortems.

when_to_use: On-call alerting and escalation for incident management teams
Runbook automation triggered by monitoring tool alerts
Postmortem tracking and incident timeline documentation

pros: Solid PagerDuty-style on-call and incident management
Competitive pricing vs PagerDuty and Opsgenie
cons: Not a crash reporting product itself
Smaller ecosystem and brand than incumbents
UI polish lags top competitors in places
review.verdict: Good-value on-call platform that pairs with crash tools; do not pick it if you need the crash capture itself.
review.best_for: Teams wanting cheaper PagerDuty-style on-call and runbooks
review.not_for: Engineers looking for stack traces and crash dashboards
